summary: Iteration 5 - CMS 'Innehåll' feature: 22/22 new backend tests pass; all 7 seeded pages verified (om-oss, kontakt, faq, kopvillkor, returer, frakt-leverans, integritetspolicy). Public list excludes body, public detail 404s for unpublished/missing, slug is normalised on create (åä→a, ö→o, spaces & underscores→dash, deduped), duplicate slug returns 400, PATCH cannot change slug, DELETE requires admin. Frontend admin CMS page renders exactly as designed: header 'Innehåll', subtitle, 'Sidor (7)' section with file/globe icons + publish switch + view/edit/delete buttons; Ny sida dialog derives slug from title, char counter present; Edit dialog disables slug field; publish toggle immediately hides page from public route; delete confirm dialog works. Public /sidor/om-oss renders Markdown H1 + paragraph + updated_at footer. 404 page shown for /sidor/nonexistent. Landing footer shows all 7 links. Sidebar has 'Innehåll' with FileText icon between Rabattkoder (idx 6) and Kommentarer (idx 8). Regression on /admin, /admin/missing-birds, /admin/posts passes.

minor.issue: Accepts a 'slug' field in body but silently ignores it (no error, no change). Could be clearer to 400 or omit from schema — currently relies on ContentPageUpdate not declaring the field so extra keys are just dropped.

action_items: IMPORTANT: The dev-server hot-reload had gone stale before this test run — the compiled bundle was missing the Landing.jsx footer-link grid until I ran 'sudo supervisorctl restart frontend'. Verified after restart. Not a code bug but flag for future runs: after landing changes, a manual restart may be needed if the bundle isn't up to date.

Pre-existing (unrelated) flaky failure in test_posts_moderation.py::TestAdminModeration::test_admin_delete_post — POST /api/posts returned no 'id' during test_admin_delete_post, likely because the shared test user hit some rate limit / block after many prior TEST_ posts across suites. Iteration 4 reported 100% pass on this suite; the failure was not observed on isolated re-runs but appears when running the full suite together. Not caused by CMS changes.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1620 lines. Consider splitting per-domain routers (auth, admin, posts, missing_birds, content) for maintainability.

ContentPageInput.slug is required, but the admin can effectively omit it since the frontend derives it from title. Consider making it Optional[str] and deriving server-side too so the API is fully self-contained.
PATCH /admin/content silently ignores unknown fields (e.g. 'slug'). Consider explicit `model_config = ConfigDict(extra='forbid')` on ContentPageUpdate to fail-fast on typos.
log_activity in admin_create_content passes 'slug' as target_id, but for update/delete it uses page_id (UUID). Inconsistent identifier choice makes the activity log harder to correlate.
The seed loop is O(N) inserts (7). Could use insert_many for a tiny efficiency gain.

Minimal Markdown renderer in ContentPage.jsx is safe (HTML-escapes first) but only supports headings/bold/italic/links/lists — no images, tables, or code blocks. Fine for the current CMS scope; document the supported subset in admin UI hint (already partially done).

success_rate.backend: 100% (22/22 new content tests + 109/110 total across all suites; the 1 failure is a pre-existing unrelated posts test)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 seeded pages listed, admin CRUD dialog + slug auto-derivation + slug disabled on edit + publish toggle hiding + delete confirm + public Markdown render + 404 page + landing footer grid + sidebar ordering all verified end-to-end)

seed_data_creation: During tests I created several TEST_-prefixed content pages and deleted them all via teardown fixture and via UI. Verified with 'Sidor (7)' returning to 7 after cleanup. Also created and deleted 'TEST Åtta öar' via UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CMS feature fully validated. All 7 seeded pages present with correct slugs. Backend: /app/backend/tests/test_content_pages.py — 22 tests, all pass; also passes with the other 3 backend suites (109/110 combined, 1 pre-existing flaky posts test). Frontend: admin /admin/content and public /sidor/:slug are fully wired. IMPORTANT tip for next iteration: if bundle appears stale (e.g. Landing.jsx changes not visible), do 'sudo supervisorctl restart frontend' — CRA hot-reload occasionally misses changes to Landing during rapid iterations. Also note: PATCH /admin/content ignores unknown 'slug' key rather than 400ing — see minor issues above.
